code:
%%{CloudNative_HelmChart}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> IDLE

    IDLE --> VALIDATING: swap_expert(CloudNative_Serverless)

    VALIDATING --> PREPARING: validation passed
    VALIDATING --> FAILED: validation failed

    PREPARING --> EXECUTING: checkpoint created
    PREPARING --> FAILED: load failed

    EXECUTING --> COMMITTING: atomic swap done
    EXECUTING --> ROLLING_BACK: swap failed

    COMMITTING --> IDLE: cleanup done

    FAILED --> ROLLING_BACK: auto-rollback

    ROLLING_BACK --> IDLE: restored

    note right of VALIDATING
        Check:
        • Architecture match
        • Tensor shapes
        • Data types
    end note

    note right of PREPARING
        Actions:
        • Load new weights
        • Create checkpoint
        • Allocate memory
    end note

    note right of EXECUTING
        ACID Atomic:
        • Lock acquired
        • Pointer swap
        • Lock released
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个云原生模型热更新的状态流转图。核心场景是：ServiceMesh里的推理服务要在不中断的情况下完成权重切换。起点应该是IDLE状态，然后有个VALIDATING阶段做前置检查。
明白，VALIDATING是从IDLE进入的。我想确认一下触发条件——是用户主动调用swap_expert(CloudNative_Serverless)来启动验证吗？另外验证失败的话直接到FAILED状态？
对，验证失败走FAILED分支。验证通过的话进入PREPARING，这个阶段要加载新权重、创建checkpoint、分配内存。如果加载失败也要进FAILED。
好的，我把PREPARING画好了。接下来PREPARING成功的话进入EXECUTING，我理解这里要做真正的指针交换？
没错，EXECUTING阶段要保证ACID原子性：获取锁、指针swap、释放锁。这个成功就进入COMMITTING做清理，失败的话要ROLLING_BACK。另外FAILED状态也要能自动回滚。
ROLLING_BACK完成后回到IDLE，COMMITTING清理完也回到IDLE，这样形成闭环。我需要在VALIDATING、PREPARING、EXECUTING三个状态右侧加详细注释说明检查项、准备动作和ACID步骤，可以吗？
可以，注释内容我来定：VALIDATING要检查架构匹配、Tensor形状、数据类型；PREPARING列那三个动作；EXECUTING强调ACID Atomic的三步。这样整个热更新流程就完整了。
全部完成。状态流转：从CloudNative_ServiceMesh进入IDLE，经swap_expert触发VALIDATING，通过后到PREPARING创建checkpoint，再到EXECUTING做原子交换，最后COMMITTING清理或ROLLING_BACK恢复，都回到IDLE。三个状态的右侧注释也已添加。
